flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 69% at Concorde Career College-Memphis vs the 2018–2022 baseline (420 vs 1.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concorde Career College-Memphis fell 62% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 517).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Concorde Career College-Memphis vs the 2003–2007 baseline (51.1% vs 60.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concorde Career College-Memphis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).
